name: gitmap-pro
description: Report Claude Code agent presence and attention to your gitmap server — live fleet view plus a durable log of which files your agents read, search, and edit.

server.title: Gitmap server URL
server.description: Base URL of your gitmap server, e.g. https://gitmap.pro

token.title: Gitmap API token
token.description: A gm_ token with the events:write scope (Pro plan required)

name.title: Contributor name
name.description: Display name attached to your agents' activity on the map; defaults to git config user.name
